Title: The Count of Monte-Cristo
Director: Alexandre de La Patellière, Matthieu Delaporte
Writer: Alexandre Dumas, Alexandre de La Patellière, Matthieu Delaporte
Actors: Pierre Niney, Bastien Bouillon, Anaïs Demoustier
Plot: After escaping from an island prison where he spent 14 years for being wrongly accused of state treason, Edmond Dantès returns as the count of Monte Cristo to exact revenge on the men who betrayed him.
